brand_identity.name: CreatorStudio AI
brand_identity.tagline: Generate viral reels + kids story videos in minutes.
brand_identity.archetype: The Performance Pro (Efficiency) x Vibrant Play (Creativity)
brand_identity.visual_style: Smart Hybrid - Dark Mode for Marketing (High Impact), Clean Light Mode for Dashboard (Focus) with Dark Mode Toggle

headings.usage: Landing page headlines, feature titles, dashboard section headers. Use tight tracking (-0.02em) for large text.

body.usage: General text, inputs, data tables, long-form content. Use relaxed line-height (1.6) for readability.

mono.usage: Code snippets, API keys, technical data displays.

primary.name: Electric Indigo
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key brand elements.

marketing.visuals: Dark immersive backgrounds, glowing gradients, large typography.

dashboard.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar (w-64), collapsible on mobile.
dashboard.visuals: Clean cards, subtle borders, glassmorphism for sticky headers.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-white hover:bg-secondary/90 shadow-lg shadow-secondary/20 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.marketing: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors
cards.dashboard: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow p-6

inputs.style: bg-background border-input ring-offset-background focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 rounded-md h-10 px-3 py-2

navigation.marketing: Floating glass navbar (top-4, mx-auto, max-w-5xl, rounded-full, border border-white/10, bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-md)
navigation.dashboard: Sidebar navigation with active state highlighting (bg-primary/10 text-primary border-r-2 border-primary)

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark) border border-white/20
visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle mesh gradients for backgrounds. Avoid harsh linear gradients.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Layered shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-xl for modals/dropdowns.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders. Use 'Tracing Beam' effect for pricing cards or featured items.

hero_image.usage: Hero section background or split layout image

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Consistent sizing (w-5 h-5 for UI, w-8 h-8 for features).

motion.loading: Use skeleton loaders (animate-pulse) for data fetching. Use spinners for actions.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA standards (4.5:1).
accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary) for keyboard navigation.
accessibility.labels: All inputs must have associated labels. Icons must have aria-labels.

do_not: Center everything - use asymmetry for interest.
